name: Islander Club
subtitle: Expansive beachfront residences
shortDescription: The Islander Club is a beachfront condo community with tennis, a fitness center, sauna, clubhouse, and a large pool along private beach frontage. Consider it if you want classic Gulf-front living with strong amenities.

name: Tangerine Bay Club
subtitle: Luxury bayfront with marina
shortDescription: The Tangerine Bay Club is an exclusive gated community with clubhouse, fitness center, pool, and day docks. Great for those considering a social waterfront lifestyle.

name: Vizcaya
subtitle: Mediterranean Gulf-front elegance
shortDescription: Vizcaya is a boutique Gulf-front community built around a resort-style pool setting, with Har-Tru tennis, a clubhouse with fitness center, and on-site management. It’s ideal for buyers who want a quieter luxury feel—more “private resort residence” than high-rise tower—while staying right on the beac

name: Privateer (Longboat Key Club)
subtitle: Beachfront within golf resort
shortDescription: Privateer is a Gulf-front condominium within the Longboat Key Club featuring an Olympic-size pool, tennis and pickleball courts, fitness center with sauna, and clubhouse amenities. It offers a full beachfront club lifestyle within a gated resort setting.

name: Grand Bay (Bay Isles)
subtitle: Luxury towers with panoramic views
shortDescription: Grand Bay is essentially a luxury tower experience featuring pools, tennis, clubhouse facilities, and gated privacy. It's a high-end residence with resort-style amenities.

name: Marina Bay (Bay Isles)
subtitle: Gated marina community
shortDescription: Marina Bay is a bayfront condominium within Bay Isles featuring private boat slips, a heated pool, gated entry, and access to the Bay Isles Beach Club. It’s ideal for buyers seeking a marina lifestyle with added private beach privileges.

name: Lands End
subtitle: Private beachfront estate setting
shortDescription: Lands End is a small gated enclave offering Har-Tru tennis, pickleball, a heated pool, and shared dockage. It’s ideal for buyers who want privacy with an active waterfront lifestyle.

name: Harbour Circle (Bay Isles)
subtitle: Canal homes with dockage
shortDescription: Harbour Circle is a maintenance-free Bay Isles villa neighborhood (42 homes) with a community pool and spa and a highly visible setting along the Longboat Key Club Harbourside golf corridor. It’s a great fit for buyers who want the “lock-and-leave” ease of a villa community while still living inside

name: Silver Sands
subtitle: Quiet Gulfside retreat
shortDescription: Silver Sands stands out as a pure beachfront resort-style property with pool amenities and easy Gulf access. Consider it if you want a simple vacation-friendly condo setting.

name: Beachplace
subtitle: Resort-style living in LBK Club
shortDescription: Beachplace is a large, resort-style beachfront community with private beach access, community pools, fitness center, and tennis amenities set across expansive grounds. Consider it if you want a vacation-style atmosphere with abundant outdoor space.

name: Lighthouse Point
subtitle: Canal-front boating access
shortDescription: Lighthouse Point is an exclusive gated neighborhood at the south end of Longboat Key featuring deep-water docks and estate-style homes. It’s a top choice for buyers seeking luxury waterfront privacy near St. Armands.

name: Inn on the Beach (Longboat Key Club)
subtitle: Beachfront resort villas
shortDescription: Inn on the Beach is a Gulf-front condominium enclave within the Longboat Key Club resort featuring beachfront pools, spa amenities, and resort services. It’s ideal for buyers seeking condo ownership with optional access to golf, tennis, dining, and spa experiences.

name: Longboat Arms
subtitle: Canal-front boating access
shortDescription: Longboat Arms is a bayfront condominium community offering boat slips, a heated pool, fishing pier, clubhouse, and outdoor recreation areas. Its boating amenities and nearby beach access create a relaxed waterfront lifestyle.

name: Bayou Hammock
subtitle: Private bayou-front enclave
shortDescription: Bayou Hammock is a gated, ultra-low-density enclave known for some of the largest residential lots on Longboat Key and a quiet, old-Florida canopy-road setting. It’s one to consider if you want rare privacy and estate-scale waterfront potential rather than “community amenity” living.

name: Country Club Shores
subtitle: Canal-front boating neighborhood
shortDescription: Country Club Shores is a classic, highly sought-after south-end neighborhood known for canal-front homes with private docks and an “Old Florida” waterfront layout. Buyers love it for the combination of boating convenience and deeded beach access, plus quick proximity to St. Armands and Sarasota.

name: The Residences at The St. Regis
subtitle: Ultra-luxury branded beachfront
shortDescription: The Residences at The St. Regis Longboat Key are positioned as a guard-gated, ultra-luxury resort-residence experience with multiple pools, spa and fitness, and chef-driven dining, plus curated owner-only amenities like a residents’ lounge and private pool/sun deck. This is the pick for buyers who w

name: Seaplace
subtitle: Amenity-rich beachfront community
shortDescription: Seaplace is a guard-gated private beachfront community with multiple pools, tennis, fitness center, clubhouse, and walking paths.

name: Sage Longboat Key
subtitle: New luxury boutique residences
shortDescription: Sage Longboat Key is a modern, ultra-boutique beachfront enclave built around wellness, with an Olympic-style lap pool, private cabanas, fire-pit lounges, a high-end fitness/wellness center, concierge service, and gated security. It’s a high-end “private resort at home” pick for buyers who want new(

name: Harbour Court (Bay Isles)
subtitle: Maintenance-free bayfront living
shortDescription: Harbour Court is a boutique Bay Isles enclave of 18 homes where each residence includes a dock on the Bay Isles waterway with direct access out to Sarasota Bay. It’s a standout for buyers who want a rare “private home + built-in boating” setup behind the gates, without the scale of a large neighborh

name: Pierre (Longboat Key Club)
subtitle: Elegant beachfront high-rise
shortDescription: Pierre is a Gulf-front condominium within the Longboat Key Club featuring private beach access, Har-Tru tennis courts, heated pool and spa, fitness center, and gated security. It’s a luxury beachfront residence offering club-level amenities in a boutique tower setting.

name: Westchester
subtitle: Direct beachfront views
shortDescription: Westchester is a residential condo community with two heated pools, a clubhouse, and on-site management that supports an easy, low-maintenance lifestyle. It’s a great fit for buyers who want a relaxed community feel and strong everyday amenities without paying for a massive resort-style tower enviro

name: Regent Place (Longboat Key Club)
subtitle: Exclusive beachfront enclave
shortDescription: Regent Place - a part of the larger Longboat Key Club - offers luxury beachfront residences with a community pool, fitness amenities, and clubhouse spaces. Consider it if you want upscale beachfront living with access to the Longboat Key Club's larger amenities.

name: Beach Harbor Club
subtitle: Affordable beach-to-bay lifestyle
shortDescription: Beach Harbor Club is a bayside community featuring a heated pool, clubhouse, fitness room, boat slips, fishing pier, and social activity spaces. Its marina amenities and community atmosphere make it attractive to buyers who prioritize boating and social waterfront living.

name: Dream Island
subtitle: Exclusive waterfront estates
shortDescription: Dream Island is a north Longboat Key boating neighborhood known for deep-water canals, larger lots, and a quiet residential feel that dates back decades. It’s a strong choice for buyers who prioritize waterfront dockage and “neighborhood privacy” over clubhouse-style amenities.

name: Longboat Key Club
subtitle: Resort and golf lifestyle hub
shortDescription: Longboat Key Club is a master-planned resort and residential community offering golf, tennis, spa, dining, marina, and private beach club amenities. It delivers a full luxury resort lifestyle tied to multiple condominium residences within the gated campus.

name: Sleepy Lagoon
subtitle: Canal-front boating community
shortDescription: Sleepy Lagoon is a large north-end neighborhood spanning both sides of Gulf of Mexico Drive with a mix of canal and inland homes. It’s attractive for buyers seeking neighborhood scale and Longboat lifestyle value.

name: Aria
subtitle: Ultra-luxury modern beachfront residences
shortDescription: Aria is a newer ultra-luxury Gulf-front enclave known for contemporary architecture and expansive water views. Consider it if you want modern design, privacy, and a high-end beachfront living experience.

name: Casa Del Mar
subtitle: Gulf-to-bay resort setting
shortDescription: Casa Del Mar is a beachfront condominium community offering direct beach access, a resort pool, tennis courts, and lounge seating along the Gulf. It’s well suited for buyers wanting a casual, resort-style setting with strong vacation and seasonal appeal.

name: Longboat Terrace
subtitle: Townhome-style Gulf-view layouts
shortDescription: Longboat Terrace is a north-end Longboat Key condo community known for townhouse-style units and a smaller-scale setting. It’s a good option for buyers who want a more residential floor-plan feel than a typical condo layout.

name: The Beach on Longboat Key
subtitle: Boutique Gulf-front elegance
shortDescription: The Beach on Longboat Key is a Gulf-front resort-style condo/hotel setup with on-site amenities like a heated Gulf-front pool, private beach access, and a BBQ/grilling area. It’s ideal if you want true beachfront with a “lock-and-leave” vibe that feels more like a boutique resort stay.

name: Conrad Beach
subtitle: Upscale coastal cottage community
shortDescription: Conrad Beach is a boutique north-end enclave offering maintenance-free living with shared community amenities like a neighborhood pool. It’s a great fit for buyers who want a “single-family feel” near quiet beaches without the upkeep burden of a large lot or big association.

name: Players Club
subtitle: Gulf-front with tennis amenities
shortDescription: Players Club is a Gulf-front condominium community featuring private beach access, heated pool with cabanas, tennis courts, fitness center, and clubhouse amenities with 24-hour security. It delivers an upscale resort-tower experience with expansive Gulf views.

name: Arbomar
subtitle: Boutique beachfront living
shortDescription: Arbomar is a boutique Gulf-front building offering direct beach access, a heated beachfront pool, fitness center, clubhouse, grilling areas, and secured entry. It’s an intimate beachfront setting ideal for buyers who want quiet coastal living with classic resort touches.

name: Harbour Oaks (Bay Isles)
subtitle: Townhomes near marina
shortDescription: Harbour Oaks is a Bay Isles villa neighborhood featuring a community pool and spa plus an active social atmosphere. It’s appealing for buyers who want gated convenience and neighborly amenities without a high-rise environment.

name: Bay Harbour
subtitle: Mid-rise bayfront with boat slips
shortDescription: Bay Harbour is a bayfront condominium community known for private marina access, boat slips, a waterfront pool, and social gathering spaces overlooking Sarasota Bay. It’s a strong fit for boating enthusiasts seeking a residential, marina-focused lifestyle on south Longboat Key.

name: Buttonwood Harbor
subtitle: Hidden bay-side neighborhood feel
shortDescription: Buttonwood Harbor is a small Longboat Key waterfront neighborhood with a hidden-gem reputation and limited inventory. It appeals to buyers seeking a quieter residential setting and who are comfortable making property-specific comparisons within a very small community.

name: Villa di Lancia
subtitle: Luxury Gulf-front residences
shortDescription: Villa di Lancia is a Gulf-front community with a resort-style clubhouse (fitness + sauna), a pool and hot tub, and two Har-Tru tennis courts that also accommodate pickleball. It’s a strong pick for buyers who want a true “beach + racquet sports” lifestyle in a well-amenitized, established Longboat K

name: Sea Grape Inn
subtitle: Gorgeous beach views
shortDescription: Sea Grape Inn is an eight-unit beachfront boutique condo-resort located directly on the Gulf of Mexico in Longboat Key. It appeals to buyers seeking low-density beachfront ownership with a small-property feel rather than a large resort complex.

name: Islands West
subtitle: High-rise with sweeping Gulf views
shortDescription: Islands West is a Gulf-front high-rise featuring private beach access, a heated beachfront pool, fitness center, sauna, tennis, and social spaces. It offers a traditional beachfront tower lifestyle with strong core amenities.

name: Beach Castle
subtitle: Direct beach access with Gulf views
shortDescription: Beach Castle is a beachfront condominium community offering private beach access, a heated pool, and vacation-style rental flexibility in a laid-back Gulf setting. It’s best suited for buyers seeking a casual coastal retreat with income potential and direct sand access.

name: Jewfish Key
subtitle: Exclusive luxury estates
shortDescription: Jewfish Key is a boat-access-only island area near Longboat Key known for exceptional privacy and a highly unique waterfront ownership experience. It’s best suited for buyers who want a true island retreat and are prepared for the logistics of boat-based access and property maintenance.

name: Sunset Beach
subtitle: Intimate beachfront enclave
shortDescription: Sunset Beach is a gated, Gulf-front community centered around a heated pool and spa/hot tub, with under-building/assigned parking that keeps the day-to-day easy. It’s a strong choice for buyers who want secure, no-fuss beachfront living in a more intimate complex.

name: Longboat Key Estates
subtitle: Spacious canal-front homes
shortDescription: Longboat Key Estates is a quiet residential neighborhood with a strong boating orientation and relaxed island setting. It’s ideal for buyers who want privacy and everyday livability on the Key.

name: The Sanctuary (Longboat Key Club)
subtitle: Private luxury Gulf towers
shortDescription: The Sanctuary is a Longboat Key Club gated enclave known for layered security (manned gate access) and resort-style amenities including a beachfront pool/spa, tennis courts (Har-Tru), fitness/recreation facilities, and beachfront gathering spots like a gazebo. It’s a top contender for buyers who wan

name: Neptune
subtitle: Boutique, gulf-front views
shortDescription: Neptune is a boutique Gulf-front condo building on Longboat Key with direct beach access and a low-density ownership feel. It’s ideal for buyers who value beachfront location and simplicity over a large-scale condo campus.

name: Sands Point
subtitle: Private beachside seclusion
shortDescription: Sands Point is a Gulf-front community with a heated pool and spa, a walkway to a more secluded stretch of beach, and waterside extras like a fishing pier (with limited/optional docks referenced in community summaries). It’s compelling for buyers who want “quiet beach + boating proximity” without the

name: Infinity
subtitle: Contemporary boutique waterfront
shortDescription: Infinity is a boutique bayfront luxury tower featuring private boat slips, a heated pool and spa, fitness center, secure entry, and under-building parking. Its limited residences and upscale finishes create an exclusive waterfront living experience.

name: Buttonwood Cove
subtitle: Boater-friendly bayfront condos
shortDescription: Buttonwood Cove is a Gulf-to-Bay community offering private beach access, boat docks, kayak launch, tennis/pickleball courts, a clubhouse, and a heated bayside pool. Its dual-waterfront lifestyle makes it especially appealing for buyers who want both boating access and laid-back beach living.

name: The Beaches (Longboat Key Club)
subtitle: Gulf-front within LBK Club
shortDescription: The Beaches is a high-rise within the Longboat Key Club area, offering full-service conveniences like concierge/24-hour doorman, a heated pool and spa, fitness center, and a resident clubroom. It’s a compelling option for buyers who want beachfront luxury with staffed building services and a more “t

name: Seascape
subtitle: Gulf-front with tennis courts
shortDescription: Seascape is a small, quiet Gulf-front condo community with direct beach access plus straightforward essentials like a heated pool and elevator service. It’s a great fit if you want “low-drama” beachfront living in a more intimate setting.

name: La Playa
subtitle: Direct beachfront privacy
shortDescription: La Playa is a Gulf-front condominium community featuring private beach access, a heated beachfront pool, and outdoor grilling areas. It’s a relaxed beachfront setting suited for buyers seeking casual coastal living.

name: Sea Oats
subtitle: Low-rise beach-to-bay setting
shortDescription: Sea Oats appears to be a tiny, low-density building (8 units) on Gulf of Mexico Drive that’s marketed in rental/listing materials as Gulf-front with walk-out beach access, but with a more “simple basics” amenity profile than the larger towers. It’s one to consider if the priority is privacy and beac

name: Sand Cay Beach Resort
subtitle: Vacation-friendly beachfront condos
shortDescription: Sand Cay Beach Resort is a beachfront condo-resort with classic vacation amenities like a heated pool, tennis, shuffleboard, and outdoor BBQ/picnic space steps from the sand. It’s a strong fit for buyers who want simple Gulf-front living with an “easy rental-friendly resort” vibe.

name: Beachcomber
subtitle: Intimate beachfront escape
shortDescription: Beachcomber is a direct Gulf-front condominium known for private beach access, a beachfront pool, and relaxed low-rise living along the shoreline. It’s a classic Longboat Key beachfront option for buyers seeking simplicity, views, and walk-out beach proximity.

name: Banyan Bay Club
subtitle: Secluded bayfront with boat docks
shortDescription: The Banyan Bay Club is a unique Gulf-to-Bay community featuring a clubhouse, pool, fitness center, tennis and pickleball courts, kayak storage, and bayside dockage with boat access. Its rare dual-waterfront layout makes it appealing for buyers who want both beach relaxation and boating lifestyle ame

name: Emerald Harbor
subtitle: Deepwater canal luxury homes
shortDescription: Emerald Harbor is a north-end boating community built around wide, deep-water canals with access out toward the Intracoastal Waterway. It’s ideal for buyers who want true dock-and-go capability in an established, single-family neighborhood setting.

name: Cabana Beach Club
subtitle: Low-density beachfront charm
shortDescription: Cabana Beach Club is a Gulf-front condominium community featuring private beach access, a heated pool, and outdoor grilling areas in an intimate low-rise setting. Its relaxed beachfront atmosphere makes it a strong fit for buyers seeking a quiet coastal retreat with classic Old Florida charm.

name: Grand Mariner
subtitle: Marina-front boating lifestyle
shortDescription: Grand Mariner is a bayfront condominium community featuring private boat slips, a heated waterfront pool, secure entry, and under-building parking along Sarasota Bay. It’s especially appealing to boating enthusiasts seeking a marina-focused lifestyle with expansive water views.

name: Tiffany Plaza
subtitle: Classic Gulf-front high-rise
shortDescription: Tiffany Plaza is a smaller Gulf-front building with a heated pool, clubhouse/meeting space, sauna, grilling area, and a private beach walkway (plus handy extras like storage/tiki hut beach storage noted by local listing sources). It’s appealing for buyers who want intimate beachfront living with the

name: Longboat Shores
subtitle: Canal homes with Gulf access
shortDescription: Longboat Shores is a canal-front neighborhood of roughly 50+ homes with docks and deep-water access to Sarasota Bay and beyond. It’s a great fit for buyers prioritizing boating function over shared amenities.

name: Seahorse Beach Resort
subtitle: Quaint beachfront getaway
shortDescription: Seahorse Beach Resort is a Gulf-front condo-resort with a heated pool overlooking the beach and a classic “walk-out private beach” setup geared toward easy stays and repeat visits. It’s a solid option for buyers who want a straightforward beachfront retreat with on-site operations and a proven vacat

name: The Bayou (Bay Isles)
subtitle: Private bayou estate homes
shortDescription: The Bayou is a Bay Isles single-family neighborhood with homes along the Bay Isles Waterway as well as golf and garden lots. It’s appealing for buyers seeking custom-home living within the gates.

name: Laguna Yacht Village
subtitle: Luxury marina-front estates
shortDescription: Laguna Yacht Village is a boutique gated boating community with HOA-maintained grounds and a shared pool environment. It’s compelling for buyers seeking beach and bay proximity within a very private neighborhood footprint.

name: Windward Bay
subtitle: Bayfront with deeded beach access
shortDescription: Windward Bay is a Gulf-to-Bay community with deeded beach access across the street, two pools, a fitness center with sauna, tennis and pickleball, clubhouse spaces, and helpful extras like kayak storage and walking trails. It’s an excellent choice for buyers who want “boating + beach” flexibility in

name: Portobello
subtitle: Mid-rise beachfront serenity
shortDescription: Portobello is a mid-Key Gulf-front condominium featuring private beach access, a heated pool, tennis courts, clubhouse amenities, and elevator access. Its boutique scale and direct beachfront setting make it appealing for buyers seeking a quieter, traditional Longboat Key beach lifestyle.

name: Sea Pines
subtitle: Your gated beachfront retreat
shortDescription: Sea Pines is a north-end Longboat Key beachfront condo community with a low-rise, lower-density feel. It’s a good fit for buyers who want direct Gulf access and a quieter alternative to larger condo towers.

name: Longboat Harbour Towers
subtitle: Waterfront views with marina
shortDescription: Longboat Harbour Towers is a Gulf-front condominium community featuring beachfront access, a heated pool, tennis courts, shuffleboard, fitness facilities, and on-site management. It offers a traditional beachfront living experience with a mix of recreational and coastal lifestyle amenities.

name: Longboat Landing
subtitle: Beautiful bayfront community with boat slips
shortDescription: Longboat Landing is a small bayfront Longboat Key condo community with only nine units and a quiet north-end setting. It stands out for buyers who want a boutique condominium with beach access and a less crowded feel.

name: Sutton Place
subtitle: Bayfront with beach access
shortDescription: Sutton Place is a bayside community with deeded private beach access, two pools, a clubhouse, fishing pier, and boat slips. Great for combining boating with beach access.

name: Bayview Estates
subtitle: Classic north-key waterfront setting
shortDescription: Bayview Estates is a Longboat Key waterfront neighborhood with a mix of older island homes, updated residences, and newer builds. It’s a good fit for buyers who want single-family living and are comfortable comparing homes individually for condition, water access, and renovation level.

name: Sea Gate Club
subtitle: Boutique Gulf-front living
shortDescription: Sea Gate Club is a beachfront community offering a heated Gulf-front pool, Har-Tru tennis, a fitness center, and strong common spaces like a social room/kitchen and library, plus on-site management and covered parking/storage. It’s a great choice for buyers who want a true “resort-amenity checklist”

name: Longboat Harbour
subtitle: Active 55+ waterfront community
shortDescription: Longboat Harbour is a large bayside community offering four pools, tennis courts, fitness center, clubhouse spaces, boat slips, kayak storage, and gated entry with private Gulf beach club access. It’s one of the most amenity-rich boating communities on Longboat Key.

name: Longboat Key Towers (Longboat Key Club)
subtitle: Beachfront within LBK Club
shortDescription: Longboat Key Towers is a beachfront condominium within the Longboat Key Club featuring private beach access, pool amenities, fitness facilities, and secure entry. It offers condo ownership paired with the broader luxury resort environment of the club.

name: Emerald Pointe (Bay Isles)
subtitle: Gated bayfront estates
shortDescription: Emerald Pointe is a private Bay Isles enclave (North & South) positioned for buyers who want a smaller, quieter neighborhood inside a gated master community. As part of Bay Isles, residents have access to the private Bay Isles Beach Club, adding a true “beach club lifestyle” layer to the neighborhoo

name: Promenade
subtitle: Luxury Gulf-front tower living
shortDescription: Promenade is a Gulf-front luxury tower featuring private beach access, heated pool and spa, tennis courts, fitness center, concierge services, and social gathering spaces. It delivers a full-service high-rise lifestyle with strong resort-style amenities.

name: Longbeach Village
subtitle: Historic north-end charm
shortDescription: Longbeach Village is a historic north-end neighborhood known for Old Florida cottages, walkability, and waterfront charm. It’s perfect for buyers seeking character and culture over structured HOA amenities.

name: Regent Court (Longboat Key Club)
subtitle: Golf villa living
shortDescription: Regent Court is an ultra-exclusive enclave behind the Longboat Key Club gates with a very limited number of luxury residences. It’s designed for buyers seeking maximum privacy and proximity to resort amenities.

name: Harbour Villa Club
subtitle: Townhome-style bayfront living
shortDescription: Harbour Villa Club is a bayside condominium community offering a private marina with boat slips, heated pool, fishing pier, and clubhouse amenities. It’s a strong fit for buyers seeking a boating-oriented lifestyle in a smaller residential setting.

name: La Firenza
subtitle: Boutique luxury on the Gulf
shortDescription: La Firenza is an ultra-luxury Gulf-front boutique building offering private beach access, resort pool and spa amenities, fitness facilities, concierge services, and secure parking. It delivers a highly exclusive beachfront living experience.

name: Bay Isles - Harbor Section
subtitle: Luxury estates with deepwater docks
shortDescription: The Bay Isles Harbor Section is a gated, prestige neighborhood inside larger Bay Isles, positioned for buyers who want a secure, private community feel on the south end of Longboat Key. A key lifestyle perk is Bay Isles ownership, which includes access to the private Bay Isles Beach Club on the Gulf

name: Whitney Beach
subtitle: North-end beachside charm
shortDescription: Whitney Beach is an amenity-rich, beach-oriented community offering tennis/pickleball, shuffleboard, a resort-style heated pool, BBQ/picnic areas, and kayak launching—plus private beach access through the Whitney Beach Conservancy. It’s a standout for buyers who want an active, outdoorsy Longboat li

name: Northgate
subtitle: A secluded north-end beach enclave
shortDescription: Northgate is a boutique Longboat Key condo community with only nine units, making it one of the more limited-inventory options on the island. It appeals to buyers who want a quieter, smaller-scale building and north-end location.

name: The Shore
subtitle: Modern boutique beachfront
shortDescription: The Shore is a Gulf-front community with a classic “beach club” feel—heated beachfront pool and spa, clubhouse/social spaces (often including library/social room), fitness room, sauna, and convenient private/covered parking. It’s worth a look if you want direct beach access with solid amenities, wit

name: Aquarius Club
subtitle: Gulf-front high-rise
shortDescription: The Aquarius Club is an intimate, Gulf-front building with resort-style features like a heated pool, tennis/pickleball, a fitness center, and updated common spaces. It's exclusive beachfront is also stunning.

name: Weston Pointe (Bay Isles)
subtitle: Luxury homes near marina
shortDescription: Weston Pointe is a small Bay Isles enclave positioned near shopping, the library, tennis facilities, and the Moorings marina. It’s ideal for buyers who want gated living with exceptional day-to-day convenience.

name: Veinte
subtitle: Exclusive mid-rise beachfront
shortDescription: Veinte is an exclusive Gulf-front community known for being small and private, with direct beach access plus amenities like a Gulf-facing pool and on-site fitness; listing sources also note a tennis/pickleball court and gated/secure entry. It’s best for buyers who want “few neighbors, big water view

name: Harbour Links (Bay Isles)
subtitle: Golf course paired villas
shortDescription: Harbour Links is a small Bay Isles enclave known for spacious residences with garages and golf-course views within a gated setting. It’s a strong pick for buyers seeking low-density Bay Isles living with an upscale residential feel.

name: Sabal Cove
subtitle: Maintenance-free bayfront homes
shortDescription: Sabal Cove is a Bay Isles single-family enclave featuring custom-built homes within a quiet gated environment. It’s ideal for buyers wanting newer-style Bay Isles living in a curated residential setting.

name: Turtle Crawl Inn
subtitle: Laid-back beachfront villas
shortDescription: Turtle Crawl Inn is a Gulf-front, resort-style condo property with a heated pool, beach access, and “easy vacation living” perks like grills/BBQ areas and tropical grounds (frequently highlighted by guest-facing materials). It’s a strong match for buyers who want a casual, stay-and-play beachfront s

name: Hideaway Bay
subtitle: No-bridge, deep-water docks
shortDescription: Hideaway Bay is a secluded Longboat Key waterfront neighborhood on Millar Bay with strong appeal for boating-focused buyers. It stands out for its deep-water dockage profile and no-bridge access, combined with a private cul-de-sac setting.

name: Queens Harbour
subtitle: Gated bayfront elegance
shortDescription: Queens Harbour is a Bay Isles neighborhood where select homes feature boat docks on navigable water, with others oriented to golf or lake views. It’s appealing for buyers seeking gated prestige with optional boating access.

name: Club Longboat
subtitle: Gulf-front with tennis facilities
shortDescription: Club Longboat is a beachfront condominium community at 5055 Gulf of Mexico Drive featuring 8 Har-Tru tennis courts, two heated pools, a Jacuzzi, sauna/spa features, a fitness center, and a clubhouse with social spaces. It’s a true “beach + tennis resort” lifestyle for buyers who want an amenity-rich

name: L'Ambiance (Longboat Key Club)
subtitle: Premier luxury beachfront towers
shortDescription: L'Ambiance is a luxury Gulf-front condo community with concierge services, tennis, pools, and private beach access. Experience a resort lifestyle in L'Ambiance.

name: Spanish Main Yacht Club (55+)
subtitle: Active 55+ waterfront living
shortDescription: The Spanish Main Yacht Club is a 55+ community offering a clubhouse, pool, boating slips, and beach access. It’s a strong option for buyers seeking social, maintenance-friendly living with boating perks.

name: En Provence
subtitle: Luxury Gulf-front exclusivity
shortDescription: En Provence is an ultra-luxury Gulf-front enclave offering private beach access, a resort pool and spa, fitness center, and concierge-style services within a gated setting. It delivers a boutique tower experience for buyers seeking privacy and high-end beachfront living.

name: Cedars West
subtitle: Bayside villas with amenities
shortDescription: Cedars West is a bayfront residential enclave connected to the Cedars Tennis Resort, with access to tennis facilities, pool amenities, and fitness spaces. It appeals to buyers who want racquet sports and waterfront living combined in a quieter residential setting.

name: Castillian
subtitle: Spacious Gulf-front residences
shortDescription: The Castillian is a Gulf-front condo community offering a heated pool and spa, tennis, clubhouse/game room with kitchen, BBQ/picnic pavilion, elevators, secure entry, under-building parking, storage, and kayak storage racks. It’s a classic beachfront building for buyers who want strong “core ameniti

name: Positano
subtitle: Mediterranean-inspired luxury
shortDescription: Positano is a luxury Gulf-front condominium enclave featuring direct beach access, a heated pool, fitness center, clubhouse and recreation facilities, gated security, and private garages. Its low-density design and modern construction create an exclusive beachfront lifestyle for high-end buyers.

name: Longboat Beach House
subtitle: Charming Gulfside villas
shortDescription: Longboat Beach House is a Gulf-front condominium community featuring private beach access, a heated pool, and outdoor grilling spaces. It’s a laid-back beachfront option with strong vacation appeal.

name: Cedars East
subtitle: Tennis resort with rental flexibility
shortDescription: Cedars East is located within the Cedars Tennis Resort, offering access to Har-Tru tennis courts, a Junior Olympic pool, fitness facilities, and clubhouse amenities. It’s ideal for buyers seeking an active, tennis-centric lifestyle in a resort-style setting.

name: Winding Oaks (Bay Isles)
subtitle: Gated enclave with privacy
shortDescription: Winding Oaks is a Bay Isles community featuring a pool, private park, and walking trails within a lush residential setting. It’s a great fit for buyers who want gated privacy with nature-oriented surroundings.

name: The Grande at Longboat Key
subtitle: Luxury Gulf-front “flow-through” views
shortDescription: The Grande at Longboat Key is a Gulf-front luxury condo community with just eight residences, giving it a private, low-density feel. It’s a strong fit for buyers seeking larger floor plans, direct beach access, and a more exclusive ownership experience.

name: Water Club
subtitle: Premier resort-style towers
shortDescription: The Water Club is a luxurious gated condominium complex with concierge services, a fitness center, a spa, tennis courts, and resort-style pool amenities. It's a private club-style living experience.

name: Bayport Beach & Tennis
subtitle: Tennis-focused bayside community
shortDescription: Bayport Beach & Tennis is a sprawling Gulf-to-Bay community with private beach access, multiple pools, Har-Tru tennis courts, a fitness center, clubhouse, and fishing pier. Its expansive grounds and amenity depth create an active, resort-style environment with a low-density residential feel.

name: Corey's Landing
subtitle: Secluded bayfront with boat slips
shortDescription: Corey’s Landing is a gated Bay Isles neighborhood of roughly 61 homes featuring a community pool and tennis, with a mix of bayfront and golf-course-oriented properties. It’s compelling for buyers who want a residential neighborhood vibe inside Bay Isles while staying close to the south-end amenities

name: Pelican Harbour & Beach Club
subtitle: Beach-to-bay boating lifestyle
shortDescription: Pelican Harbour & Beach Club is a waterfront community offering marina access, heated pool, tennis, fitness facilities, and clubhouse amenities. Its boating access combined with beach privileges creates a balanced Gulf-to-Bay lifestyle.

name: Fairway Bay (Bay Isles)
subtitle: Gated golf course surroundings
shortDescription: Fairway Bay  (part of the larger Bay Isles community) offers tennis, fitness, clubhouse spaces, and multiple pools within a gated setting. Consider it if you want an active lifestyle with access to the larger Bay Isles amenities.
